items.title: Apple’s Biggest Bear Isn’t Budging. Hear Him Out.
items.description: FEATURE  It’s been an awful year for Apple investors. That’s just a fact. The iPhone maker’s stock is down nearly 20%. UnitedHealth Merck and Salesforce are the only three stocks in the that fared worse in the first half of 2025.
